syllogism_text: It is the case that no cat is a dog. Among the animals that are cats, some are pets. The logical consequence is that there are pets that are not dogs.

attempts.code:
% Facts (witnesses)
cat(fluffy).
pet(fluffy).

% Fail clauses
dog(_) :- fail.

% Rules from premises
% All cats are not dogs (explicitly deny possibility)
conflict :- cat(X), dog(X).

% Validity check (Some pets are not dogs)
valid_syllogism :- pet(X), \+ dog(X).
